sections.title: Could Have — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Could Have is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + could have + past participle (past possibility that did not happen). Rules: 'Could have' expresses something that was possible in the past but did not happen | Formula: could have + V3 (past participle) | Negative: could not have + V3 | Different from 'should have' — could have = possibility, should have = regret/advice
sections.formula: Subject + could have + past participle (past possibility that did not happen)

examples.hindi: मैं यह पहले कर सकता था।
examples.english: I could have done this earlier.

examples.hindi: तुम मुझे बता सकते थे।
examples.english: You could have told me.

examples.hindi: वह यह काम आसानी से कर सकता था।
examples.english: He could have done this work easily.

examples.hindi: हम समय पर पहुँच सकते थे।
examples.english: We could have arrived on time.

examples.hindi: वह इस मौके का फायदा ले सकती थी।
examples.english: She could have taken this opportunity.

examples.hindi: तुम यह गलती avoid कर सकते थे।
examples.english: You could have avoided this mistake.

sections.title: Could Have — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Could Have for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + could have + past participle (past possibility that did not happen)

examples.hindi: वे जीत सकते थे।
examples.english: They could have won.

examples.hindi: मैं तुम्हारी मदद कर सकता था।
examples.english: I could have helped you.

examples.hindi: वह सच बोल सकता था।
examples.english: He could have told the truth.

examples.hindi: हम इसे बेहतर बना सकते थे।
examples.english: We could have made it better.

examples.hindi: तुम मुझे कॉल कर सकते थे।
examples.english: You could have called me.

examples.hindi: वह पैसे बचा सकती थी।
examples.english: She could have saved money.

sections.title: Could Have — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Could Have — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Could Have in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + could have + past participle (past possibility that did not happen)

examples.hindi: मैं वहाँ जा सकता था।
examples.english: I could have gone there.

examples.hindi: वे इसे रोक सकते थे।
examples.english: They could have stopped it.

examples.hindi: तुम पहले आ सकते थे।
examples.english: You could have come earlier.

examples.hindi: वह यह किताब पढ़ सकता था।
examples.english: He could have read this book.

sections.title: Could Have — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Could Have — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Could Have. Common mistakes: wrong verb form after the modal, or missing "have" in perfect modals.
sections.formula: Subject + could have + past participle (past possibility that did not happen)

examples.hindi: हम ज्यादा मेहनत कर सकते थे।
examples.english: We could have worked harder.

examples.hindi: मैं वह नौकरी ले सकता था।
examples.english: I could have taken that job.

examples.hindi: वह इसे ठीक कर सकती थी।
examples.english: She could have fixed it.

examples.hindi: तुम यह decision नहीं ले सकते थे।
examples.english: You could not have taken this decision.
